Health_Department_Name: Shasta County Health and Human Services
Program_Description: Medi-Cal provides health care coverage to California residents with low income.
Target_Population: Pregnant people, low-income families with children, individuals with low income
Eligibility_Requirements: Low income; varies by age and disability status
Application_Process: Online through BenefitsCal or Covered California; by phone; by mail; in person

Health_Department_Name: Shasta County Health and Human Services
Program_Description: The Healthy Moms, Healthy Babies Program supports pregnant women and moms parenting children under age 2 by connecting them to compassionate care and local resources tailored to their needs.
Target_Population: Pregnant women and mothers with children under age 2

Health_Department_Name: Shasta County Health and Human Services
Program_Description: The Mother-to-Mother group provides a safe space for mothers experiencing anxiety and depression, allowing them to connect with others and learn ways to manage their feelings.
Target_Population: Mothers experiencing anxiety and depression

Health_Department_Name: Shasta County Health and Human Services
Program_Description: The Shasta County WIC program helps families eat well, stay healthy, and be active.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children.
Eligibility_Requirements: If you receive Medi-Cal, CalWORKs or CalFresh (Food Stamps), you could meet the income eligibility for WIC.
Application_Process: Test out your eligibility online or contact Shasta County WIC.

Health_Department_Name: Shasta County Health and Human Services
Program_Description: The WIC program provides nutritional support and education to women, infants, and children.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children
Application_Process: Apply online using BenefitsCal, Apply in person, or Call the Customer Service Center

Target_Population: First-time moms who are less than 28 weeks pregnant
Application_Process: Anyone can refer a woman to NFP; women can self-refer or be referred by healthcare providers.
